##NAMES=Holtstamite
##RRUFFID=R170001
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Ca_3_Al_2_(SiO_4_)_2_(OH)_4_
##LOCALITY=Wessels mine, Kalahari manganese field, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Paul Botha
##DESCRIPTION=Yellow to brownish-yellow granular crystals, associate with Mn-rich vesuvianite, calcite, and henritermierite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R170001
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 12.2878 b: 12.2878 c: 11.9748 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 1808.06 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
